message: init: Set up PR view skeleton
feat(pr-view): Implement body header with mock data
feat(pr-view): Add reviewers and assignees base UI
style(pr-view): Align top two components of page
docs(pr-view): Write comments for functions and components
format(pr-view): Use Prettier formatting on all files
chore(pr-view): Rename Comment component to PRViewComment

body:
LOOKS 🔥😼!! I just left some comments primarily about spacing, but they're more like my personal design preferences so you can take them with a grain of salt if you do not agree. It's lwk because I was not very careful when I did the spacing in the Figma designs for this page, but lmk what you think!

The only other thing was about using the index as the key when iterating through a map. I'm thinking we might have to potentially change that in the future if it causes problems.

message: fix(pr-view): Use data values as map keys
